\section{Fisher's $z$-transform}
\label{Fisher}
\noindent
The function tabulated below is Fisher's $z$-transform
\[
z(r)\equiv \tanh^{-1}(r) = \frac12\log\left(\frac{1+r}{1-r}\right).
\]
